gateDefinition.description: typecheck / test / build, run as the single 'build' job in .github/workflows/ci.yml. store has NO eslint config, so there is no lint step in the gate (see CLAUDE.md / toon-meta#210).

gateSpeed.description: CI wall-clock time for the 'build' job (the gate) on the representative run above.
gateSpeed.note: fullWorkflowRunWallClockSeconds also includes the parallel, non-gate 'Devbox Environment Validation' job (devbox-validate); the gate itself is the 'build' job only.

runnerMinutesBilled.method: GitHub Actions bills hosted-runner jobs in 1-minute increments; the gate ('build') job ran 25s wall-clock, so it bills as 1 runner-minute. `gh api repos/toon-protocol/store/actions/runs/<id>/timing` reported 0 billable ms for this run, which reflects included free-tier minutes rather than an unbilled job — the rounded-up job duration is used here as the reproducible proxy.

dockerImageSize.note: The gate itself (ci.yml 'build' job) does not build or use a Docker image — it runs directly on ubuntu-latest via pnpm. For reference, the published runtime image (Dockerfile.store, ghcr.io/toon-protocol/store:latest at this same commit) is captured separately below since it is the only Docker image in this repo's pipeline; it is NOT part of the gate's critical path.

publishedRuntimeImageReference.method: Sum of OCI manifest layer `size` fields fetched anonymously from the GHCR v2 API (public package): `curl -s https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:toon-protocol/store:pull` for a bearer token, then GET /v2/toon-protocol/store/manifests/<amd64-manifest-digest>.

cacheHitRate.method: actions/setup-node@v4's built-in pnpm store cache. Checked the last 10 ci.yml 'build' job logs (`gh run view --job=<id> --log | grep 'Cache hit occurred'`) — all 10 hit the cache keyed on pnpm-lock.yaml.

lint.note: store has no eslint config today (toon-meta#210 repo-specific note: 'store — add the missing eslint config'). Adding that config is a separate, later child of this epic, not this baseline-capture issue.

typecheck.method: pnpm run typecheck (tsc --noEmit) on commit 0f45a45 — clean, matches the repo's documented '0 typecheck debt'.

reproductionMethod.gateSpeedAndPerformance: gh run list --workflow=ci.yml --limit 10 --json ...; gh api repos/toon-protocol/store/actions/runs/<id>/jobs; gh run view --job=<id> --log
reproductionMethod.gateCorrectness: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test, read locally from a checkout of the same commit.
